positive: A stylized, whimsical forest landscape featuring geometric flora and fauna. Main subject is a group of ethereal woodland creatures (foxes, rabbits, owls) intertwined with massive, stylized trees with clean, patterned bark and bioluminescent foliage. Use a retro psychedelic art style mixed with minimalist Nordic illustration aesthetics. High contrast, deep jewel tones (teal, sapphire blue, emerald green) accented by burnt orange and mustard yellow for pop. Strong black outlines (clean linework) for separation and bold silhouettes, making it perfect for central apparel placement. Composition should be balanced and symmetrical, ensuring clear visibility even when scaled. Vector illustration quality, print-ready, designed on a circular or square canvas.
negative: blurry, messy, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, artifact, noise, bad anatomy, malformed, extra limbs, cartoonish, photorealistic, oil painting, gritty, bokeh, fuzzy
